name: SOLENO THERAPEUT. DL-,001
summary: Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapeutics for the treatment of rare diseases. Their lead product candidate is DCCR (diazoxide choline controlled-release) for the treatment of Prader-Willi Syndrome (PWS). Soleno Therapeutics is headquartered in Redwood City, California.
